allow: Bash(python3.12 -c "import mcp; import anthropic; import fastmcp; print\('mcp:', mcp.__version__, '| anthropic:', anthropic.__version__, '| fastmcp:', fastmcp.__version__\)")
Bash(python3 infer.py "write a Python function that checks if a string is a palindrome")
Bash(python3 -m py_compile tools/executor.py logger_rt.py orchestrator.py run_round_table.py test_round_table.py)
Bash(python3 -c "import fastapi, httpx, pydantic, uvicorn, dotenv, langgraph, radon, pylint; print\('all OK'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; agents=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a['name'], '->', a['url']\) for a in agents]")

hooks.prompt:
A file in the AgentTeam project was just modified. The tool input is: $ARGUMENTS

If it is a project source file (*.py, requirements.txt, .env, run_all.py, test_task.py), update /Users/masashakra/Desktop/AgentTeam/CLAUDE.md to reflect any architectural changes — new files, changed behaviour, model swaps, new modules, bug fixes, etc. Only update sections that are actually affected. Do not rewrite the whole file unless the change warrants it.
